description: Interactive database installer with support for SQL, NoSQL, file-based, graph, and search databases.

messages.notAdmin: This script must be run as Administrator.
messages.scriptDisabled: Database installation is disabled in config.
messages.menuPrompt: Enter numbers (1,2,5), group letter (a-e), A=all, N=none, Q=quit, Enter=run:
messages.menuNoSelection: No databases selected -- nothing to install.
messages.installPathCustom: Enter custom path for database installations:
messages.installPathPrompt: Choose install location [1] Dev dir  [2] Custom path  [3] System default:
messages.notInPath: {name} installed but not found in PATH -- restart your terminal.
messages.completedWithWarnings: Completed with some warnings -- check output above.
messages.loopBack: Returning to menu -- select more databases or press Q to exit.
messages.symlinkVerifyMissing: {name} junction not found after install -- expected in databases folder.
messages.symlinkVerifyNotJunction: {name} path exists at {path} but is not a directory junction.
messages.uninstallDryRunBanner: --- UNINSTALL DRY RUN -- no changes will be made ---

commands..\\ run.ps1: Interactive menu -- pick databases to install
commands..\\ run.ps1 -Uninstall: Interactive menu -- pick databases to uninstall
